title: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies, government agencies
summary_full: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with a government export control directive citing "national security authorities."
summary_public: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with a government export control directive citing "national security authorities."
